tasks.label: CI Check
tasks.command: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build

tasks.label: Patch Release
tasks.command: npm version patch && git push && git push --tags && gh release create v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --generate-notes

tasks.label: Minor Release
tasks.command: npm version minor && git push && git push --tags && gh release create v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --generate-notes

tasks.label: Major Release
tasks.command: npm version major && git push && git push --tags && gh release create v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") --generate-notes
